items.title: New footage shows joy at Orion capsule hatch being opened
items.summary: Newly released video shows the moment the hatch of Artemis II's Orion capsule is unlocked to a happy reunion with the four astronauts.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.

items.title: Mario Ríos Montt, Bishop and Brother of Genocidal General, Dies at 94
items.summary: In Guatemala, he led the Catholic Church’s human rights office. His brother, a dictator who took power in a coup, was convicted of crimes against humanity.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Streeting relaunches women’s health strategy to tackle ‘medical misogyny’
